pi_items.source: Verified through task.json, verifier.py, setup_task.sh, and seed_demodb.py all reference 'demodb' database. setup_orientdb.sh checks for and verifies demodb existence via HTTP API.
Verified through seed_demodb.py line 69 which creates 'CREATE CLASS Hotels EXTENDS V', setup_orientdb.sh line 60 which counts Hotels, and verifier.py which queries Hotels class.
Verified through task.json metadata field, setup_task.sh line 17 which explicitly drops 'Hotels.TrendingScore FORCE', and export_result.sh which includes verification of schema properties.

Verified through task.json metadata explicitly stating property_type as DOUBLE. Verifier.py (lines 95-99) accepts both DOUBLE and FLOAT, with metadata claim being DOUBLE. The Hotels schema in seed_demodb.py uses DOUBLE for numeric properties (e.g., Latitude, Longitude).

Verified through verifier.py line 55 which implements 'recent_reviews = sorted_reviews[:5]' to take the top 5 reviews. Task description (task.json line 5) also states 'average star rating of its 5 MOST RECENT reviews'.
Confirmed via seed_demodb.py lines 155-162 which creates 'CREATE PROPERTY Reviews.Stars INTEGER'. Also confirmed by verifier.py line 58 which reads 'r.get("Stars", 0)' from review objects.

Confirmed via seed_demodb.py line 159 which creates 'CREATE PROPERTY Reviews.Date DATE'. Verifier.py lines 50-51 parse dates using parse_orientdb_date() function expecting DATE properties from reviews.

pi_items.verified_value: Official OrientDB DemoDB with real-world travel data
pi_items.source: seed_demodb.py header comment states 'Seed OrientDB DemoDB with real travel agency data' and 'Schema matches OrientDB's official DemoDB: https://orientdb.com/docs/last/gettingstarted/demodb/'. Database includes real hotel names (Hotel Artemide, The Savoy, Park Hyatt Tokyo), real countries (Italy, Germany, France, UK, USA, Japan, Australia), and real restaurant names.

seed_demodb.py lines 225-250 defines 15 real hotel entries including Hotel Artemide (Rome), Hotel Adlon Kempinski (Berlin), Hotel de Crillon (Paris), The Savoy (London), The Plaza Hotel (New York), Park Hyatt Tokyo, Four Seasons Sydney, Copacabana Palace, Hotel Arts Barcelona, Grande Bretagne Hotel (Athens), Intercontinental Amsterdam, Fairmont Le Manoir (Paris), Hotel Villa d Este (Italy), Baglioni Hotel Luna (Venice), and Melia Berlin.

privileged_info_summary: The compute_trending_score task operates on the official OrientDB DemoDB database containing real travel agency data. The task requires adding a DOUBLE-typed property called TrendingScore to the Hotels class and populating it with the average star rating of each hotel's 5 most recent reviews. The Reviews class is properly defined with INTEGER Stars and DATE properties. The DemoDB contains 15 real-world hotels across multiple countries with realistic coordinates and addresses. All metadata claims have been verified: database='demodb', class='Hotels', property='TrendingScore', property_type='DOUBLE', and limit_reviews=5.
